labels.name: addressModalDescriptionLabel
labels.value: Form to create or edit a shipping address.

labels.name: requiredShippingPhoneMissing
labels.value: A phone number is required for the selected shipping address. Edit your shipping address and add a valid phone number.

labels.name: shipToMultipleLocationsNoAddressLabel
labels.value: Enter or select an address first before shipping to multiple addresses.

labels.name: shipmentWithSubscriptionLabel
labels.value: You can't split a shipment with a digital good or a subscription. To split the shipment, return to your cart and remove the item.
